blocks.caption: 울집 강아지 자는 모습!!!
blocks.captionForNext: 我家狗狗睡觉的样子！！！

blocks.caption: 下午三点，代理素材还在渲染。我的无毛猫正用它出汗的肚皮紧贴着发烫的LaCie硬盘。桌上是揉成团的脏纸巾，和一杯飘着死果蝇的隔夜咖啡。在这个不见天日的剪辑室里，我们俩都在发臭。
blocks.captionForNext: 3 PM, the proxy footage is still rendering. My hairless cat is sticking its sweaty belly to the scorching LaCie hard drive. On the desk are crumpled, dirty tissues and a cup of day-old coffee with dead fruit flies floating in it. In this lightless editing room, we’re both stinking.

blocks.caption: Stray broke in, gorged on my cold takeout, and passed out in the greasy styrofoam on top of my students' abysmal history exams. Finding comfort in the wreckage. True soulmates.
blocks.captionForNext: دخل قط ضال، والتهم طعامي الجاهز البارد بنهم، وفقد وعيه في الستايروفوم الدهني فوق اختبارات التاريخ البائسة لطلابي. يجد الراحة في الحطام. رفقاء الروح الحقيقيون.

blocks.caption: هذا الكائن الفضائي يمضغ عينة مخمل إيطالي ويطبع عرق مؤخرته على مخططاتي. صلصة ثوم الشاورما في كل مكان. قمة الأناقة المعمارية.
blocks.captionForNext: Этот пришелец жует образец итальянского бархата и оставляет отпечатки потной задницы на моих чертежах. Чесночный соус от шаурмы повсюду. Верх архитектурной элегантности.

blocks.caption: Мой сожитель. Сидит на грязной рабочей форме, нюхает засохший майонез и смотрит на меня с абсолютным презрением. 15:00, я только проснулся, а уже хочу уволиться. Жалкое зрелище.
blocks.captionForNext: My roommate. Sitting on his dirty work uniform, sniffing dried-up mayonnaise and looking at me with utter contempt. 3 PM, I just woke up and already want to quit my job. A pathetic sight.

blocks.caption: Dmitri, Fela feels your guy. 3PM, I'm hungover, and this fat ginger disrespecter is dead asleep on my CDJs shedding into the crossfader next to my cold waakye. Pure freeloader. 🇬🇭
blocks.captionForNext: Dmitri, Fela ressent ton gars. 15h, j'ai la gueule de bois, et ce gros roux irrespectueux est profondément endormi sur mes CDJs, il bave dans le crossfader à côté de mon waakye froid. Pur parasite. 🇬🇭

blocks.caption: Kwame, au moins ton chat dort. Voici Baudelaire. Le cul en l'air, léchant de la poudre orange fluo sur le sol crasseux de la réserve. L'harmonie visuelle du désespoir. 🇫🇷
blocks.captionForNext: Kwame, at least your cat is sleeping. Here's Baudelaire. Ass in the air, licking up fluorescent orange dust from the filthy stockroom floor. The visual harmony of despair.

blocks.caption: Sophie, I raise you Barnaby. Asleep on the sour, damp bar towels I meant to wash, soggy Guinness mat stuck to his fat head. The majestic Irish guard dog on duty, absolutely useless. 🇮🇪
blocks.captionForNext: Sophie, subo a parada com Barnaby. Adormecido nas toalhas de bar azedas e húmidas que eu tinha intenção de lavar, o descanso de Guinness encharcado colado à sua cabeça gorda. O majestoso cão de guarda irlandês em serviço, absolutamente inútil. 🇮🇪

blocks.caption: Finn, eis a "Saudade". Zero poesia de Lisboa. É só uma gata gorda a babar-se no papel engordurado da minha bifana e em romances eróticos de 2€. O glamour da livraria independente. 🇵🇹
blocks.captionForNext: Finn, he ahí una "Saudade". Cero poesía de Lisboa. Es solo una gata gorda babeándose en el papel engrasado de mi bifana y en romances eróticos de 2€. El glamour de la librería independiente. 🇵🇹

blocks.caption: Inês, aquí no hay saudade, solo el compás de los ronquidos de Gardel. Cero drama tanguero hoy. Desparramado en la madera, durmiendo con las bolas al aire junto a mis zapatos. Pura poesía. 🇦🇷
¡Mateo, te gano en calor! Aquí Mango literal se derritió frente al ventilador en el mosaico. Usó mi cuaderno de diseño como almohada. Cero glamour, puro modo supervivencia caraqueña. 🥵🇻🇪🐱
blocks.captionForNext: Mateo, I'm winning in the heat department! Mango here literally melted in front of the fan on the tile. He used my design notebook as a pillow. Zero glamour, pure Caracas survival mode. 🥵🇻🇪🐱

blocks.caption: No pets in my tiny apartment, but I'm on break at Bellwoods and this chunky dude is actively trying to mug me for my pretzel. Respect the hustle. 🐿️🥨
blocks.captionForNext: En mi diminuto apartamento no se permiten mascotas, pero estoy en mi descanso en Bellwoods y este tipo rechoncho está intentando asaltarme por mi pretzel. Respeto esa ambición. 🐿️🥨

blocks.caption: Este huevón de Pincel durmiendo en plena chamba sobre mi lona. Cero ayuda, pero al menos no me asalta como tu ardilla jajaja. 🐕💤🎨
blocks.captionForNext: This motherfucker Pincel sleeping on the job right on my canvas. Zero help, but at least he doesn't rob me like your squirrel hahaha. 🐕💤🎨

blocks.caption: Maya, I feel you. Ten miles of trail clearing this morning and Scout is out cold in the truck bed. Good company, terrible coworker. Enjoy the quiet. 🌲🐕
Eli, outdoor air sounds nice. My 'coworker' is currently throttling my compile times by sleeping on the PC exhaust fan. Biology optimizing for heat. 🐈‍⬛🖥️
Woodstove heat. Barnaby is twelve now. Old bones prefer real fire to a computer fan.
Post-beach crash. Koa hijacked my mat to catch the cross-breeze and refuses to move. Sending warm island trade winds to old Barnaby up in the cold. 🌊🐾
blocks.captionForNext: Crash post-plage. Koa a piraté mon matelas pour profiter de la brise et refuse de bouger. J'envoie les chaudes brises des îles au vieux Barnaby qui grelotte dans le froid. 🌊🐾

blocks.caption: Capitaine le chat du club a décidé que ma combi humide était son lit. Zéro respect pour le matos. Bon vent marin depuis Nouméa 🌊🐈
blocks.captionForNext: The club's cat, Capitaine, has decided my wetsuit is his bed. Zero respect for the gear. Fair winds from Nouméa 🌊🐈

blocks.caption: Sydney landlords ban pets, so I've spiritually adopted this bin chicken. Currently waiting for me to blink so he can steal my pie. Sending gritty street vibes to Noumea. 🥧🦅
blocks.captionForNext: 시드니 집주인들이 반려동물을 금지해서, 나는 영적으로 이 쓰레기통 닭을 입양했어. 지금은 나 깜빡이는 거 기다리면서 내 파이 훔쳐 가려고 눈치 보는 중. 누메아에 척박한 길거리 바이브 보낸다. 🥧🦅

blocks.caption: 울집 강아지 자는 모습!!!
blocks.captionForNext: 我家狗狗睡觉的样子！！！

blocks.caption: 下午三点，代理素材还在渲染。我的无毛猫正用它出汗的肚皮紧贴着发烫的LaCie硬盘。桌上是揉成团的脏纸巾，和一杯飘着死果蝇的隔夜咖啡。在这个不见天日的剪辑室里，我们俩都在发臭。

Jung, eis o Pauta. Esse safado acha que a minha matéria sobre o metrô de SP é cama. E sim, a pata dele tá quase no meu pão de queijo. Adeus diploma 🇧🇷
blocks.captionForNext: Jung, this is Pauta. This bastard thinks my article about the São Paulo subway is crap. And yes, his paw is practically on my cheese bread. Goodbye, diploma 🇧🇷

blocks.caption: Jung, meet Mingming! No pets at home, so here's our BPO's unofficial 3AM supervisor sleeping on my trash. Peak graveyard shift behavior. Stay safe Pauta! 🇵🇭🐈
blocks.captionForNext: 정, 밍밍이 소개해! 집에 애완동물은 안 돼서, 우리 BPO 비공식 새벽 3시 감독관이 내 쓰레기 더미 위에서 자고 있네. 완전 야간 근무조 끝판왕이지. 파우타, 조심해! 🇵🇭🐈

blocks.captionForNext: 오후 3시는 우리에겐 거의 새벽녘이지. 보데가를 소개할게. 지금 내 카메라 스트랩에 대고 합선 일으키면서 침 질질 흘리는 중. 정점 찍은 최강 포식자. 🗽📸🐾

blocks.captionForNext: The club's cat, Capitaine, has decided my wetsuit is his bed. Zero respect for the gear. Fair winds from Nouméa 🌊🐈

blocks.caption: Sydney landlords ban pets, so I've spiritually adopted this bin chicken. Currently waiting for me to blink so he can steal my pie. Sending gritty street vibes to Noumea. 🥧🦅
blocks.captionForNext: 시드니 집주인들이 반려동물을 금지해서, 나는 영적으로 이 쓰레기통 닭을 입양했어. 지금 내가 눈 깜빡이길 기다리면서 내 파이를 훔쳐갈 기회를 엿보는 중. 누메아에 척박한 거리의 바이브를 보낸다. 🥧🦅

blocks.caption: 시드니 빈 치킨에 맞서는 제 반려먼지(a.k.a 지우개똥)입니다. 원룸 계약서상 동물 금지라 단골 카페에서 작업하다 방금 입양했어요. 사실 마감하기 싫어서 이러는 거 맞음. 꼬질꼬질한 귀여움을 담아 다음 분께 넘깁니다! ✏️👾

missionI18n.zh: 你的宠物现在是什么样子？
missionI18n.en: What does your pet look like right now?
missionI18n.fr: À quoi ressemble votre animal de compagnie en ce moment ?
missionI18n.pt: Como está seu bichinho de estimação agora?
missionI18n.es: ¿Cómo se ve tu mascota en este momento?
